allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Service | Where-Object {$_.Name -like '\\''*SQL*'\\''} | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status | Format-Table -AutoSize')
PowerShell(sqlcmd -S "localhost\\SQLEXPRESS" -E -C -Q "IF DB_ID\('mvkhc'\) IS NULL CREATE DATABASE mvkhc; SELECT name FROM sys.databases WHERE name = 'mvkhc';")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-ItemProperty 'HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Microsoft SQL Server\\MSSQL16.SQLEXPRESS\\MSSQLServer\\SuperSocketNetLib\\Tcp\\IPAll' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TcpPort, TcpDynamicPorts")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; Process=$p.ProcessName} } | Sort-Object Port -Unique | Format-Table -AutoSize')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; Process=$p.ProcessName} } | Where-Object {$_.Process -like '\\''*sql*'\\''}')

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/com/microsoft/sqlserver/mssql-jdbc_auth/12.6.1.x64/mssql-jdbc_auth-12.6.1.x64.jar' -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
